_comment: DOCQC-004/005 fixture. This file is the coverage contract for docs/index.html:
domains = 10 requirement areas from WTJ-20260703-002; facts = decided spec points that must survive any rewrite.
CONTRACT (doc-side): the document is obligated to carry its own QA assertion inventory —
* every atomic requirement is a node with data-req-id="REQ-{DOMAIN}-{NN}";
* every requirement domain is a section with data-domain="{DOMAIN}" (codes below in domain_code);
* the #coverage matrix table (域码/需求域名称/章节锚点/REQ ID范围/条数 + 合计行) declares itself
『此表同时作为 QA 的断言清单』. DOCQC-004 reconciles that matrix against the actual visible
data-req-id nodes: every declared REQ id must have exactly one visible definition node, no wild
REQ ids outside the matrix, per-domain counts and the 合计 must agree, and each matrix anchor must
point to an existing section whose data-domain matches. If the doc drops the whole
data-req-id/#coverage system, DOCQC-004 reports a missing-contract problem — that is the TL's
obligation to restore, not a test to relax.
CONTRACT (fixture-side / maintenance):
* domain patterns and fact groups are case-insensitive regexes matched ONLY against the visible text
of the data-domain section slice(s) named by domain_code / scope (style/script stripped, whitespace
collapsed, img alt & aria-label included, hidden/display:none subtrees excluded). Residue in nav,
captions or parameter tables outside the owning section does NOT count.
* facts pin DECISIONS, not wording. Each group is a disjunction of concept-level regexes. If a
legitimate synonymous copy-edit (e.g. 不算失败→不判定为失败, 长按→按住, 自带→内置) turns a fact red,
the correct fix is to broaden the group regex here — never to ask the TL to change the prose.
A fact should only stay red when the underlying product decision actually disappeared or changed;
in that case update the fixture together with the decision and note it in the QA card.
* if TL deliberately renames a concept, update this fixture in the same change and note it in the QA card.

domains.name: 默认界面（干净画布、低调入口）
发现槽
patterns: 默认.{0,3}3\s*个?\s*(主)?发现槽|默认三个.{0,2}发现槽|3\s*个主发现槽

domains.name: 退出机制与快捷键安全
奖励系统（宝箱/状态灯/一次性）

facts.name: 发现槽默认三个（可配置扩展至五，超出主槽以 ghost 占位）
groups: 默认.{0,3}3\s*个?\s*(主)?发现槽|默认三个.{0,2}发现槽|3\s*个主发现槽

facts.name: Esc 不直接退出，家长退出走长按/口令
groups: Esc
不直接(触发)?退出|不.{0,4}直接退出|(长按|按住|持续按).{0,12}Esc

facts.name: 应用内拦截 Command+H/W/Q 等常见快捷键
groups: (Command|Cmd)\s*\+\s*(H|W|Q)
拦截|屏蔽|禁|阻止|挡(住|下)|吃掉

facts.name: 不虚假承诺完全屏蔽系统级快捷键
groups: 未必|不承诺|不能保证|无法保证|不保证|做不到|虚假承诺
100\s*%|完全|彻底|系统级

facts.name: 不使用 Chrome 自带发音作为产品声音
groups: 不(使用|采用|用|依赖|拿)\s*.{0,6}(Chrome|浏览器).{0,4}(自带|内置|默认)

facts.name: 奖励一次性、画面能回到干净
groups: 一次性|短(暂|动画)|临时
淡出|消失|消退|退场
干净|不长期占用|不.{0,10}(变脏|堆积|堆满)

facts.name: 任务超时自动收起且不算失败
groups: 自动(收起|淡出|关闭|消失|退场)
不(算|判定为|判为|视为|视作|记为?)失败

facts.name: 任务不依赖中文文字说明
groups: 不(显示|依赖|出现|靠).{0,6}(中文|文字)|(中文|文字).{0,8}不(显示|出现)

facts.name: 同词重复命中只给小反馈、不再占新槽
groups: 重复命中|同一个词.{0,14}重复|重复.{0,10}同一个词
不再?(点亮|占)|不占|小反馈

facts.name: 目标机器 2014 MacBook Air、全屏桌面应用
groups: MacBook\s*Air
全屏

facts.name: 重复按键衰减、长按不持续计数
groups: 衰减|变弱|减弱
(长按|按住|一直按).{0,12}不.{0,8}计数|(长按|按住)一个键

expectations._comment: 跨脚本共享的可配置预期。min_images: docqc_browser.py 与 capture_docs.py 的最小 数下限;TL 把 mock 全部换成内联 SVG/canvas 时在同一变更里设为 0(空集语义通过),不需要改脚本。
